name: alabjs-monorepo
description: AlabJS — full-stack React framework powered by a Rust compiler core

scripts.clean: turbo clean && find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && cargo clean
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter alabjs build && pnpm --filter alabjs-vite-plugin build
scripts.dev:basic-ssr: pnpm build:packages && cd examples/basic-ssr && node ../../packages/alabjs/dist/cli.js dev
scripts.dev:dashboard: pnpm build:packages && cd examples/dashboard-csr && node ../../packages/alabjs/dist/cli.js dev
